notes: Official Vermont Center for Geographic Information statewide parcel FeatureServer layer for current active parcels joined to Grand List data. The Vermont Open Geodata Policy allows no-cost access, download, sharing, and integration of open geodata from the state portal, while prohibiting direct non-value-added resale. User approved this source for local ingestion on 2026-06-21; public/ad-supported display, direct resale restrictions, protected-address exclusions, and ongoing terms compliance remain operator responsibilities. Owner mailing address fields are source-observed property-tax contact context, not confirmed residence.
